data.body:
"Irodori Canvas" Korean Version Digital Soundtrack Release Notice

Sensei, the digital soundtrack for the Korean version of "Irodori Canvas" has been released!
Vocal songs have also been added to the website rhythm game "LIVIN' ON SWEETS!", so please check that out too!

🎧Listen to the Korean Version of "Irodori Canvas": https://lnk.to/QM0617
🎬Watch the "Irodori Canvas" Video: https://youtu.be/foPj3y3oj4g
🎮Play the special rhythm training mini game LIVIN' ON SWEETS!: https://bluearchive.nexon.com/events/2024/10/minigame

#BlueArchive
